status.sql: SELECT module_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM (SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING(content, POSITION('import ' IN content) + 7, POSITION(' ' IN SUBSTRING(content, POSITION('import ' IN content) + 7) || ' ') - 1)) AS module_name FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS" WHERE "sample_path" ILIKE '%.py' AND POSITION('import ' IN content) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING(content, POSITION('from ' IN content) + 5, POSITION(' ' IN SUBSTRING(content, POSITION('from ' IN content) + 5) || ' ') - 1)) AS module_name FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS" WHERE "sample_path" ILIKE '%.py' AND POSITION('from ' IN content) > 0) AS modules GROUP BY module_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5 /* Extracting module names from Python scripts */
solved_subquestions_list: Extract and count module names from Python scripts

status.sql: SELECT module_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM (SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING("content", POSITION('import ' IN "content") + 7, POSITION(' ' IN SUBSTRING("content", POSITION('import ' IN "content") + 7) || ' ') - 1)) AS module_name FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS" WHERE "sample_path" ILIKE '%.py' AND POSITION('import ' IN "content") > 0 UNION ALL SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING("content", POSITION('from ' IN "content") + 5, POSITION(' ' IN SUBSTRING("content", POSITION('from ' IN "content") + 5) || ' ') - 1)) AS module_name FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS" WHERE "sample_path" ILIKE '%.py' AND POSITION('from ' IN "content") > 0) AS modules GROUP BY module_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5 /* Extracting module names from Python scripts */
solved_subquestions_list: Extract and count module names from Python scripts

status.sql: SELECT library_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM (SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING("content", POSITION('library(' IN "content") + 8, POSITION(')' IN SUBSTRING("content", POSITION('library(' IN "content") + 8) || ')') - 1)) AS library_name FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS" WHERE "sample_path" ILIKE '%.r' AND POSITION('library(' IN "content") > 0) AS libraries GROUP BY library_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5 /* Extracting library names from R scripts */
